items.name: use-copy
items.title: useCopy
items.description: Clipboard copy hook with copied-state feedback timer.
items.author: worthingtravis <https://github.com/Worthingtravis>

items.name: terminal-lib
items.title: Terminal Utilities
items.description: Shared terminal utilities — timing computation and color class map.
items.author: worthingtravis <https://github.com/Worthingtravis>

items.name: terminal-chrome
items.title: Terminal Chrome
items.description: macOS-style terminal window shell with traffic light buttons and optional title bar.
items.author: worthingtravis <https://github.com/Worthingtravis>
items.docs:
Wrap any content in a macOS-style terminal window. Supports title, left/right header slots, and custom className.

This component requires the terminal color palette CSS variables. They are automatically added to your CSS when you install this component.

items.name: typing-text
items.title: Typing Text
items.description: CSS-only typewriter animation with blinking cursor.
items.author: worthingtravis <https://github.com/Worthingtravis>
items.docs: Pure CSS typewriter effect — no JS animation loop. Set `text`, `delay`, and `duration` props to control timing.

items.name: tool-call-block
items.title: Tool Call Block
items.description: MCP tool call display with name, arguments, and result.
items.author: worthingtravis <https://github.com/Worthingtravis>
items.docs: Displays a tool call in the Claude Code style — tool name, arguments, and result. Set `delay` to 0 for instant render or use a ms value for fade-in animation.

items.name: tool-call-block-inline
items.title: Tool Call Block Inline
items.description: Inline single-line variant of ToolCallBlock — compact tool call display.
items.author: worthingtravis <https://github.com/Worthingtravis>

items.name: copyable-row
items.title: Copyable Row
items.description: Click-to-copy wrapper with hover highlight and copy/check icon transition.
items.author: worthingtravis <https://github.com/Worthingtravis>
items.docs: Wrap any content to make it click-to-copy. Shows a subtle hover highlight and animated copy/check icon.

items.name: scroll-prompt
items.title: Scroll Prompt
items.description: Animated scroll-down prompt that appears when a target section is out of view.
items.author: worthingtravis <https://github.com/Worthingtravis>

items.name: step-flow
items.title: Step Flow
items.description: Interactive multi-step flow visualizer with clickable step buttons, arrow connectors, detail panel, and back/next navigation. Great for checkout flows, onboarding wizards, or any sequential process.
items.author: worthingtravis <https://github.com/Worthingtravis>
items.docs: Pass an array of `steps` with `label` and `description`. Use `initialStep` to set the starting position and `onStepChange` for controlled navigation.

items.name: flow-diagram
items.title: Flow Diagram
items.description: Animated architecture flow diagram with nodes connected by bezier-curved edges. Features draw-on animation, flowing particles, hover highlighting, dot grid background, and radial glow. All data-driven via props.
items.author: worthingtravis <https://github.com/Worthingtravis>
items.docs: Pass arrays of `nodes`, `edges`, and `positions` (percentage coordinates). Use `wideNodeId` to make one node wider. Set `live: true` on a node for a pulsing indicator. Edges support `optional` (dashed) and `bidirectional` (reverse particles).

items.name: avatar-picker
items.title: Avatar Picker
items.description: Avatar picker with DiceBear generated avatars (8 styles), paginated grid, custom seed input, and drag-and-drop file upload. Self-contained — bundles its own DiceBear URL builder.
items.author: worthingtravis <https://github.com/Worthingtravis>
items.docs: Pass `currentSeed` (e.g. "pixel-art:my-seed") and wire up `onSelectGenerated`. Set `allowUpload` to false to hide the upload tab. Customize grid with `gridCount` and `columns`.

items.name: profile-editor
items.title: Profile Editor
items.description: Profile editor card with avatar, status indicator, editable name/bio fields, and save/cancel actions. Supports compact (settings) and full (onboarding) layouts.
items.author: worthingtravis <https://github.com/Worthingtravis>
items.docs: Pass `displayName`, `status`, and optional `avatarUrl`, `username`, `bio`. Set `editing` to enable editable fields and wire up `onDisplayNameChange`, `onSave`, etc. Use `compact` for inline settings layout.

items.name: mini-terminal-demo
items.title: Mini Terminal Demo
items.description: Compact animated terminal card with copy-to-clipboard, pin support, and stagger delay. Exports DemoEntry and DemoScenario types.
items.author: worthingtravis <https://github.com/Worthingtravis>
items.docs: Define a `DemoScenario` with entries (input, output, tool-call, claude) and pass it as the `scenario` prop. Set `play` to true to start the animation.

items.name: terminal-demo
items.title: Terminal Demo
items.description: Full animated terminal session with typing, tool calls, thinking indicators, memory blocks, and copyable rows.
items.author: worthingtravis <https://github.com/Worthingtravis>
items.docs: Pass a `script` array of `TerminalEntry` items. Each entry has a `kind`: `input` (typed command), `output` (static line), `tool-call` (MCP call with args/result), `phase` (section divider), `thinking` (animated dots), `claude` (AI response), `ask` (option list), `memory` (saved block). All entries share `pauseAfter` (ms delay before next).
